content_en: So how can it be that the one who leaves off visiting it is harsh to the Prophet -sallAllaahu alayhi wa sallamand is one who turns away from him!?' All Praise belongs to Allaah, may His peace and blessings be upon our final Prophet Muhammad, His family, his companions and all those who follow his guidance.
content_id: Maka bagaimana mungkin orang yang meninggalkan kunjungan ke makam tersebut dikatakan bersikap keras kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berpaling darinya!? Segala puji bagi Allah, semoga shalawat dan salam-Nya tercurah kepada Nabi kita yang terakhir Muhammad, keluarganya, para sahabatnya, dan semua orang yang mengikuti petunjuknya.
